description: This clutch from fabindia references authentic Indian style with its materials and design details. Epitomise the ethnic boho chic look when you match this to Indian ensembles or pair it with a dress and heels for a great Indo-Western fusion.Dimensions : 11 cm x 25 cmBlue silk upper with beaded detail along the openingDouble magnetic button closureFabric inner Pouch inside for mobile pouchCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
